item.title: 台积电第二季度利润创历史新高，承诺进一步投资 1000 亿美元用于美国扩张
item.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) reported a record second-quarter net profit on Thursday, as continued AI-driven demand for its advanced chips pushed revenue past its own guidance and prompted a sharp upward revision to its 2026 outlook. The post TSMC posts record Q2 profit, commits further $100bn to U
